basicInfo.name: Nightmare Ellin
basicInfo.flavor: The two Dark Elf sisters handle the hardest assassination assignments given by the lich. The sisters earned their respective titles through their deadly deeds.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Mark of Death
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 245% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 50% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 245% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Extreme Evasion
Skill 2.desc:
Self
 - Grants Physical Resistance. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Physical Resistance to 20%.

Passive.name: Evasive Maneuvers
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Physical Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Physical Damage Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
A dark elf assassin and a member of the Shadow Clan. She's the younger twin sister of Ellen, and the two are bitter rivals with Jane.
When Kris was accused of murdering his knights and fleeing the country, Rudy was in disbelief and requested various parties to look into the event, including the Shadow Clan. The members charged with carrying out this mission were the dark elf twins.
However, they mistook the assignment as an assassination when it should've been simple reconnaissance. They challenged Kris but ended up losing, which led to the annihilation of the Shadow Clan's Asgar branch.
They're quite formidable fighters in their own right, but they were up against an opponent that was out of their league.
The sisters get along really well. Ellin's generally quiet and unexpressive, and she occasionally makes clumsy mistakes.
